hero.title: 10th SFG Czech Airsoft team
hero.subtitle: We are a MilSim team from the Moravian-Silesian region, inspired by the American 10th Special Forces Group. If you're looking for realistic MilSim operations, professional approach, and an environment where you can constantly improve, you might just find your place with us.

offers: Membership in a team with MilSim operation experience
Sharing of our knowledge and practical experience
Quality, private operations throughout the Czech Republic
Opportunity for personal development and combat tactics training
expectations: Desire to dedicate yourself to MilSim airsoft and improve
Team spirit and sense of fair play
Willingness to invest time and resources in yourself and the team
equipment: Basic equipment for sleeping in the forest
about.discordDescription: Members get access to our internal Discord server — a central hub built around operational discipline and continuous improvement:
discordFeatures: Dedicated channel for each mission with full briefing
Team coordination channels and voice ops
about.joinDescription: Just write us a few words about yourself and why you want to join us. We'll get back to you, arrange a meeting, and discuss everything you're interested in. Final recruitment takes place mainly during exercises in the Králický Sněžník and Mošnov areas.
about.joinProcessTitle: What to expect after reaching out
joinSteps: Someone from our team will reach out to arrange a personal meeting or, if the timing works, invite you to the next mission — either a full-scale operation or an FTX where you’ll meet most of the team as a recruit.
After the event, the team decides whether you’re someone we want to spend our weekends with.

New recruits must complete our ‘hell weekend’ — SFAS — the most demanding weekend we run, designed to make sure you can handle everything we do. It’s a tough challenge, but one you’ll look back on with pride.
